section.heading: Designs not subject to protection
section.chapeau: Protection under this chapter shall not be available for a design that is—

paragraph.content: staple or commonplace, such as a standard geometric figure, a familiar symbol, an emblem, or a motif, or another shape, pattern, or configuration which has become standard, common, prevalent, or ordinary;
different from a design excluded by paragraph (2) only in insignificant details or in elements which are variants commonly used in the relevant trades;
dictated solely by a utilitarian function of the article that embodies it; or

embodied in a useful article that was made public by the designer or owner in the United States or a foreign country more than 2 years before the date of the application for registration under this chapter.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1999—Par. (5). Pub. L. 106–44 substituted “2 years” for “1 year”.
